title: gymnomyosotis spathulata
intro: Gymnomyosotis spathulata, also known as the forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing stress and anxiety. Gymnomyosotis spathulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine.
